title: coelogyne oxyglossa
intro: Coelogyne oxyglossa, also known as the yellow orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and relieve inflammation. The plant's extracts have been found to possess antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues, such as respiratory problems, skin infections, and digestive issues. Traditionally, Coelogyne oxyglossa is prepared into herbal infusions, decoctions, or dried extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
